technical.lead: Apple Q2 FY26 prints Apr 30 after-close
technical.body: revenue $111.2B (+17% YoY) beating $109.66B estimate; diluted EPS $2.01 vs $1.94 est.; iPhone $57B (+22%); Services record $30.98B (+16%); Greater China $20.5B (+28%); gross margin 49.3%; +$100B buyback + 4% dividend hike to $0.27; Q3 guide rev +14-17%; AAPL +2% AH; Mag 7 super-week closes with mixed monthly tape — Apr 30 S&P 7,196.01 (+1.02%) first-ever close above 7,200, Nasdaq +0.89%, both setting new records and best month since 2020 — — Apple's quarter capped a Mag-7 super-week (MSFT/GOOGL/META/AMZN Apr 29; AAPL Apr 30) with the cleanest top-line beat of the cohort. iPhone 17 family was called "the most popular lineup in our history" by Cook even as iPhone revenue missed the consensus high-side ($57B reported vs JPM's $59.5B). The $100B buyback authorization is the second straight FY-Q2 with a $100B program; the Q3 guide of +14–17% revenue is the high end of analyst expectations.

citations.label: AppleInsider - Apple earnings crush Wall Street consensus again, Q2 record smashed

technical.lead: Microsoft–OpenAI partnership reset Apr 27 + OpenAI on AWS Bedrock launches Apr 28 (limited preview): GPT-5.5 / OpenAI frontier models on Bedrock, Codex on Bedrock, Bedrock Managed Agents powered by OpenAI; Codex CLI 0.128.0-alpha.1 ships Apr 30 with `/goal`, in-app browser, Unix-socket app-server transport, model-provider-owned discovery (AWS Bedrock account state exposed to clients); OpenAI Agents SDK Apr 30 adds model-native harness + native sandbox execution with Blaxel / Cloudflare / Daytona / E2B / Modal / Runloop / Vercel as sandbox providers
technical.body: — The Microsoft license to OpenAI IP is now non-exclusive through 2032; OpenAI revenue-share to Microsoft continues through 2030 but with a cap; Microsoft is no longer paying revenue-share to OpenAI. The Bedrock launch is OpenAI's first non-Azure home for first-party model serving and the structural counter to the Apr 28 WSJ revenue-miss tape. The Apr 30 Agents SDK + Codex CLI updates make sandbox-execution + harness orchestration first-class primitives across the OpenAI stack.

citations.label: AWS - Amazon Bedrock now offers OpenAI models, Codex, and Managed Agents (Limited Preview)

technical.lead: CISA KEV Apr 30 adds CVE-2026-41940 cPanel & WHM Missing-Authentication-for-Critical-Function (CVSS 9.x, federal remediation deadline May 21); fresh Apr 30 CVE wave
technical.body: CVE-2026-7503 / CVE-2026-6389 / CVE-2026-6543 / CVE-2026-7551 all CVSS 8.8; LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (CVSS 9.3) carry-forward — pre-auth SQLi against the Authorization header on /chat/completions, single litellm_credentials row leaks OpenAI / Anthropic / Bedrock keys; first exploitation 26h after disclosure; SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) still unpatched into May 1 (~12 days post-disclosure) — — cPanel & WHM is the management plane for tens of thousands of shared-hosting fleets; KEV listing turns this from a vendor-advisory into a federal-mandate event. LiteLLM is the canonical 2026 LLM-gateway-as-blast-radius case (one row holds OpenAI org keys, Anthropic admin tokens, AWS Bedrock IAM); the model-tooling-layer-injection class (LiteLLM + Spring AI + SGLang + vLLM) now spans the AI-stack supply chain top-to-bottom.

citations.label: CISA - Adds One Known Exploited Vulnerability to Catalog (Apr 30)

technical.body: Cloud Security Alliance authorized as a CVE Numbering Authority (CNA) by MITRE specifically for agentic-AI vulnerability coordination; STAR for AI Catastrophic Risk Annex (4-phase rollout June 2026 → Dec 2027, aligned with NIST AI RMF / EU AI Act / ISO/IEC 42001); Autonomous Action Runtime Management (AARM) specification contributed by Vanta + Agentic Trust Framework (ATF) stewardship transferred from MassiveScale.AI; pairs with MITRE ATT&CK v19 (Apr 28) Defense-Evasion split into Stealth + Defense Impairment + new agentic-AI named techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) — — The CNA authorization is the first agentic-AI-specific CVE issuer; combined with ATT&CK v19's named techniques and AARM/ATF as open specs this is the institutional layer of the agent-skills threat-class taking shape in real time. The Apr 30 Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA + Foundry Toolkit for VS Code GA + Foundry Toolbox preview lands the vendor-side counterpart on the Microsoft stack.

citations.label: CSA - CSAI Foundation Announces Key Milestones to Secure the Agentic Control Plane

technical.lead: Powell Apr 29 confirms staying on Federal Reserve Board of Governors after Chair-term ends May 15
technical.body: first Fed Chair since 1948 to remain on Board; "I won't be a shadow chair" framing; Warsh nomination confirmed by Senate Banking same day; Apr 30 monthly recap — Apr was Mag 7's strongest month since 2020 with Alphabet +34% on the month, AAPL +5% on Q2 print + Q3 guide, MSFT -3.8% on Apr 29 print + capex sticker shock, META -7.5%; Apr Jobs Report releases May 1 8:30 AM EDT (forecast 135K vs Mar 178K); Big Tech 2026 AI capex now tracking $700B (Alphabet/Meta/Microsoft/Amazon Q1 capex >$130B alone) — — Powell's Board seat runs through 2028, converting the May-15 handoff narrative from "Powell exits" to "Powell stays as a check on the Trump-admin Fed investigation". The $700B 2026 AI-capex print is the structural number; it puts the Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss thesis in proportion. May 1 jobs print is the first non-earnings macro tape into the May 15 Chair handoff.

citations.label: PBS NewsHour - Powell says he will stay on Fed board after chair term ends
